_comment: Two-way DesignSync config — see DESIGNSYNC.md. The Claude Design project is the source of truth; this repo mirrors it under localDir. Used as the target + localDir for the DesignSync MCP tool.
name: Watermark Design System

notes.synced: Foundations + all 40 component specs (components/{core,forms,record,charts,hydrology}/** + ui_kits/**) + 11 guideline cards are mirrored. The charts/hydrology/Icon families were added upstream after the first audit and pulled in a second pass (tokens/colors.css gained the --data-* chart-series ramp). Drift vs the live Astro impls is recorded in COMPONENT-AUDIT.md; reconciliation (Stage 2) is gated on review. On the next pull, move newly-synced paths here from `pending`.
notes.pending: Only assets/brand/** remains (intentionally — see below). NOT mirrored (design-canvas artifacts, not components): explorations/** and templates/social-kit/**. On a future pull, the exact paths come from DesignSync list_files.
notes.generated: Authored by the Claude Design app's self-check / tooling — never mirror or push these.
notes.assets/brand/**: Brand binaries already live in web/public/ (favicons, app icons); only mirror here if you want them version-controlled in the design system too.
